name: raycast-mimo-tts
title: MiMo TTS
description: Read selected or clipboard text aloud with Xiaomi MiMo TTS — Chinese and English voices, fine-grained style controls, and chunked long-text playback.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Read selected text, or clipboard text if no selection is available. Trigger again to stop.

commands.name: read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Browse MiMo voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: select-voice
commands.title: Set Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Choose and preview the MiMo voice used by Quick Read.

commands.name: tts-studio
commands.title: TTS Studio
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Generate and play MiMo speech from typed, selected, or pasted text, with voice, emotion, and style controls.

commands.name: design-voice
commands.title: Design Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Generate a custom MiMo voice from a one-sentence description (MiMo-V2.5-TTS-VoiceDesign). Supports auto-optimized sample text.

commands.name: clone-voice
commands.title: Clone Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Replicate a voice from an mp3 or wav sample (≤10 MB) and read your text aloud (MiMo-V2.5-TTS-VoiceClone).

commands.name: setup-voice-defaults
commands.title: Setup Voice Defaults
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Configure the default MiMo model, voice, speech rate, style prompt, and token-plan base URL.

commands.name: stop-reading
commands.title: Stop Reading
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Stop the current MiMo TTS playback.

commands.name: speed-up-reading
commands.title: Speed up Reading
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Increase reading speed by 0.25× for the next playback.

commands.name: slow-down-reading
commands.title: Slow Down Reading
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Decrease reading speed by 0.25× for the next playback.

commands.name: playback-status
commands.title: Reading Status
commands.subtitle: MiMo TTS
commands.description: Menu-bar status of the current MiMo TTS reading with playback and speed controls.

preferences.name: mimoApiKey
preferences.title: MiMo Token Plan API Key
preferences.description: MiMo Token Plan API key. Must start with tp-, not sk-.

preferences.name: mimoTokenPlanBaseUrl
preferences.title: Token Plan Base URL
preferences.description: Override the MiMo Token Plan endpoint. Leave empty to use the default.

preferences.name: mimoModel
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: MiMo TTS model used for synthesis.

preferences.name: mimoDefaultVoice
preferences.title: Default Voice
preferences.description: Default voice for Quick Read and other commands.

preferences.name: mimoSpeechRate
preferences.title: Default Speech Rate
preferences.description: Baseline reading rate. Speed up / slow down commands override this for the current session.

preferences.name: mimoStylePrompt
preferences.title: Default Style Prompt
preferences.description: Optional natural-language direction sent to MiMo for every reading.
preferences.placeholder: e.g., Read with a calm, scholarly tone.
